description: Expected benchmark results for reproducible testing. These values are based on typical performance on a mid-range laptop (16GB RAM, SSD). Allow 20-30% variance for different hardware.

ingestion.description: Ingestion throughput for sample corpus. Actual performance varies based on CPU and disk speed.

search.description: Search latency in milliseconds. First query may be slower due to cold start.

notes: Run benchmarks with --seed 42 for reproducible results
Close other applications for most consistent results
First run may be slower due to JIT compilation
SSD recommended for consistent ingestion performance
